raw_text: {"chat_id":"UNKNOWN","exported_at":"2026-04-12T21:45:00+03:00","source_platform":"ChatGPT","source_model":"UNKNOWN","system":"AREAL-NEVA ORCHESTRA on Ubuntu VPS with Telegram bot interface, OpenRouter LLM, SQLite memory, file-based orchestra memory, eZone memory ingest, and server-first workflow","architecture":"Telegram -> /root/.areal-neva-core/telegram_daemon.py -> either eZone file-memory ingest or task creation in /root/.areal-neva-core/data/core.db -> /root/.areal-neva-core/task_worker.py -> /root/.areal-neva-core/core/ai_router.py -> OpenRouter API with memory context -> Telegram replies; shared memory also stored in /root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files and /root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory.db","pipeline":"eZone path: Telegram text or file recognized as memory export -> normalize broken JSON-like content -> save into file memory folders -> update chat mapping -> reply with one short status message -> stop. Ordinary path: Telegram text or voice -> create task in core.db with state NEW -> task_worker picks task -> ai_router processes -> reply sent to Telegram -> task state changes through NEW, IN_PROGRESS, AWAITING_CONFIRMATION, DONE, FAILED, or ARCHIVED. Memory dump path: trigger phrase like 'память оркестра' -> collect file-memory dump from GLOBAL, CHATS, SYSTEM -> return immediately without dialogue","memory":"Two memory layers are used. File memory root: /root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files with GLOBAL/timeline.jsonl, CHATS/<chat_id_or_chat_key>/raw.json, CHATS/<chat_id_or_chat_key>/timeline.jsonl, SYSTEM/*.jsonl, ERRORS/errors.log, and CHAT_MAP.json. DB memory: /root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory.db with table memory(id, chat_id, key, value, timestamp) accessed through memory_api_server.py at 127.0.0.1:8091 and fallback SQLite reads. File memory is used for orchestra export/import and router context; DB memory stores recent conversational items and snapshot export","integrations":"Telegram Bot API via aiogram polling, OpenRouter chat completions API, Groq Whisper STT observed in logs via whisper-large-v3-turbo, local memory API at 127.0.0.1:8091, Google Drive reserved for heavy files only","files":["/root/.areal-neva-core/telegram_daemon.py","/root/.areal-neva-core/task_worker.py","/root/.areal-neva-core/core/ai_router.py","/root/.areal-neva-core/core/stt_engine.py","/root/.areal-neva-core/core/web_engine.py","/root/.areal-neva-core/core/reply_sender.py","/root/.areal-neva-core/core/pin_manager.py","/root/.areal-neva-core/memory_api_server.py","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/core.db","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory.db","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files/CHAT_MAP.json","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files/GLOBAL/timeline.jsonl","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files/CHATS/<chat_id_or_chat_key>/raw.json","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files/CHATS/<chat_id_or_chat_key>/timeline.jsonl","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files/SYSTEM/system.jsonl","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files/SYSTEM/architecture.jsonl","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files/SYSTEM/pipeline.jsonl","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files/SYSTEM/memory.jsonl","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files/ERRORS/errors.log","/root/.areal-neva-core/logs/telegram_daemon.log","/root/.areal-neva-core/logs/task_worker.log","/root/.areal-neva-core/logs/memory_api.log","/root/.areal-neva-core/runtime/voice_queue"],"services":["telegram_daemon.py","task_worker.py","memory_api_server.py"],"env":["TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN","OPENROUTER_API_KEY","OPENROUTER_MODEL","MEMORY_API_TOKEN","GROQ_API_KEY","OPENAI_API_KEY","ORCHESTRA_SNAPSHOT_CHAT_ID"],"db":"core.db stores tasks with fields including id, chat_id, user_id, input_type, raw_input, state, result, error_message, reply_to_message_id, created_at, updated_at. memory.db stores memory with fields id, chat_id, key, value, timestamp. File-memory directories store raw.json as latest chat export, timeline.jsonl as append-only history, SYSTEM jsonl files as append-only blocks, and CHAT_MAP.
